intentSynonyms: update a product quantity in dominos
edit a product quantity in dominos
change the details of product quantity in dominos
modify a product quantity in dominos
change quantity of a cart item in dominos
description: Change the quantity of a product already in the cart. Set quantity to 0 to remove it. Get the product_instance_id from get_cart (the "id" field of each product).

product_instance_id.description: Product instance ID from get_cart (the "id" field of each cart product)

quantity.description: New quantity (0 to remove the item)
